_readme: Narrow, reviewed suppressions for the universal secret-scan gate.
Each entry MUST name an exact file path (no globs, no directories) plus the
exact rule id it suppresses, and MUST carry a documented reason. Blanket or
directory-wide ignores are rejected by the scanner on purpose.
Prefer the inline marker on the offending line instead:
Never add a suppression to hide a real secret — rotate it instead.
